channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Build a pipeline and close deals with an exhibit table at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Get an unmatched ROI by exhibiting your startup in front of 10,000 tech leaders and investors at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, October 13-15 in San Francis...

item.title: How to Set Up an Apple Watch for Your Kids (2026)
item.description: Want to give your children an easy way to contact you—without giving them a smartphone? Family Setup on WatchOS can help.

item.title: Amazon Pharmacy to expand same-day delivery to nearly 4,500 US cities
item.description: The expansion will cover customers in newly served states such as Idaho and Massachusetts.

item.title: 9 Best Cheap Laptops (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: From surprisingly good $300 Chromebooks to excellent $650 Windows laptops, these are the best budget laptops we’ve tested.

item.title: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro 8KHz Review: A Keyboard for the Competitive
item.description: This esports keyboard isn't particularly comfortable, but it's incredibly competitive.

item.title: Former Founders Fund VC Sam Blond launches AI sales startup to upend Salesforce
item.description: The startup, Monaco, has come out of stealth as an AI-native all-in-one CRM plus more system backed by names like the Collison brothers and Garry Tan.

item.title: Upside Robotics is reducing fertilizer use and waste in corn crops
item.description: Upside Robotics builds autonomous solar-powered robots that can help farmers reduce their fertilizer use by 70%.

item.title: Wacom MovinkPad 11 Tablet Review: A Portable Sketch Pad
item.description: Wacom’s Android-based drawing pad tries, and mostly succeeds, to pack a full digital art workstation into a portable sketch pad.

item.title: Jessie Diggins’ Starter Pack: Winter Olympics 2026
item.description: What a three-time Olympic medalist packs to Milano Cortina 2026.

item.title: TikTok launches an opt-in Local Feed in the U.S. leveraging users’ precise location
item.description: TikTok's new Local Feed will show you nearby shopping, dining, events, news, and more.
